description: Publish a Marshal Dughan bounty when the player kills five Westfall murlocs inside thirty seconds.

publish.quest_description_template: You cut down {threshold_count} murlocs in {window_seconds} seconds, but {turn_in_npc_name} wants the line broken for good. Hunt down {followup_kill_count} more {target_name} before they regroup.
publish.offer_reward_text_template: "That should buy the farms some breathing room," says {turn_in_npc_name}. "Stormwind remembers this service."
publish.request_items_text_template: Drive back {followup_kill_count} more {target_name}, then return to {turn_in_npc_name}.
